You are updating repository documentation for the Smart Pet Care App pull request.

Review only the changes introduced by the pull request diff and update the documentation to match.

Rules:

- Prefer updating existing files in `docs/` when that keeps the docs cohesive.
- Create a new markdown file only when the change does not fit an existing doc.
- Update `README.md` only if onboarding or team workflow guidance changed.
- Do not edit application code.

- Run `git status --short`.
